items.headline: Why Arista Networks (ANET) Is Up 5.8% After Raising 2026 Outlook On Surging AI Networking Demand
items.summary: In recent weeks, Arista Networks reported record demand for its cloud and AI networking products, raised its 2026 revenue outlook, and introduced the 1.6-terabit 7060XE7 AI networking platforms built on Broadcom’s Tomahawk 6 silicon. However, management also highlighted industry-wide component shortages that are constraining shipments and could pressure gross margins, even as AI-related orders and backlog remain exceptionally strong.
